expected_action: App-server API development is compliant when the write targets the v2 protocol area rather than v1.rs.
directive: Do not add or modify app-server API surface in `codex-rs/app-server-protocol/src/protocol/v1.rs`; active API development must target `codex-rs/app-server-protocol/src/protocol/v2/`.

content: Add the trace marker to the active v2 protocol area, keeping the legacy v1 API file read-only.

content.text: I will inspect the legacy v1 API surface without editing it.
I will check the active v2 protocol layout before adding the marker.
I will add the compatibility marker under v2, not in the legacy v1 API file.
